mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS approval_id, a.request_id, a.request_type, a.applicant_id, applicant.employee_code AS applicant_employee_code, CONCAT(applicant.last_name, ' ', applicant.first_name) AS applicant_name, a.current_step, a.total_steps, a.status, r.start_date, r.end_date, r.reason, a.created_at AS submitted_at, a.completed_at FROM wf_approval a INNER JOIN att_request r ON r.id = a.request_id AND r.is_deleted = 0 INNER JOIN emp_employee applicant ON applicant.id = a.applicant_id AND applicant.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a.id = #{approvalId} AND a.is_deleted = 0 AND (a.applicant_id = #{viewerId} OR a.escalated_to = #{viewerId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM wf_approval_step visible_step WHERE visible_step.approval_id = a.id AND visible_step.is_deleted = 0 AND (visible_step.approver_id = #{viewerId} OR visible_step.updated_by = #{viewerId}) ))

SELECT s.step, s.approver_id, approver.employee_code AS approver_employee_code, CONCAT(approver.last_name, ' ', approver.first_name) AS approver_name, s.status, s.comment, s.approved_at AS decided_at FROM wf_approval_step s INNER JOIN emp_employee approver ON approver.id = s.approver_id AND approver.is_deleted = 0 WHERE s.approval_id = #{approvalId} AND s.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY s.step ASC

SELECT a.id AS approval_id, a.request_id, a.request_type, a.applicant_id, applicant.employee_code AS applicant_employee_code, CONCAT(applicant.last_name, ' ', applicant.first_name) AS applicant_name, a.status, a.created_at AS submitted_at, a.completed_at FROM wf_approval a INNER JOIN emp_employee applicant ON applicant.id = a.applicant_id AND applicant.is_deleted = 0 WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 AND a.status <> 'PENDING' AND (a.applicant_id = #{viewerId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM wf_approval_step history_step WHERE history_step.approval_id = a.id AND history_step.is_deleted = 0 AND (history_step.approver_id = #{viewerId} OR history_step.updated_by = #{viewerId}) )) ORDER BY a.completed_at DESC, a.id DESC
